feedback.prefix: Got feedback or ideas? Write to us at

description.earlyAccess: Enjoy all Pro features for free during early access.
description.trial: {{days}} days left in your Pro trial.
description.free: You're on the Free plan. Switch to Pro to unlock everything.

empty.title: No templates yet
empty.description: Create a template to speed up replies, follow-ups, and first outreach.

modal.descriptionNew: Save a base message to reuse later with dynamic variables.
modal.descriptionEdit: Adjust the details of your reusable message.

pipeline.title: Pipeline
pipeline.description: Tune how the pipeline works so it fits your way of working.

cobrado.title: Use Paid stage
cobrado.descriptionEnabled: Deliverables move through Paid as the last stage — ideal if you track payments.
cobrado.descriptionDisabled: Completed is the last stage of the pipeline. Enable it if you want to separate paid items.
cobrado.disabledToastWithMoves_one: Paid stage disabled. {{count}} deliverable moved to Completed.
cobrado.disabledToastWithMoves_other: Paid stage disabled. {{count}} deliverables moved to Completed.

confirm.title: Disable the Paid stage?
confirm.descriptionWithTasks_one: There is {{count}} deliverable in Paid. It will move automatically to Completed and the stage will no longer show in the pipeline.
confirm.descriptionWithTasks_other: There are {{count}} deliverables in Paid. They will move automatically to Completed and the stage will no longer show in the pipeline.
confirm.descriptionEmpty: Completed will become the last stage of the pipeline. You can re-enable Paid anytime.

onboarding.title: Restart onboarding
onboarding.description: Show the guided tour again next time the app loads.

language.title: Language
language.savingError: We couldn't save your language. Please try again.

notifications.title: Push notifications
notifications.description: Get alerts when you have nearby deliverables or relevant changes.
notifications.permissionRequired: You need to allow browser notifications to enable them.
notifications.unsupported: Your browser doesn't support push notifications.

taskReminders.title: Task reminders
taskReminders.description: Get native alerts the day before and the day each deliverable is due.
taskReminders.permissionRequired: Enable notification permissions in your device settings.

googleCalendar.title: Google Calendar
googleCalendar.descriptionConnected: Connected · your deliverables sync with Google Calendar.
googleCalendar.descriptionDisconnected: Sync deliverables and dates with your calendar.
googleCalendar.connectError: We couldn't start the Google Calendar connection.

changeEmail.title: Change email address
changeEmail.description: Update the email tied to your account.

changePassword.addDescription: Add a password to also sign in with your email.
changePassword.changeDescription: Update the password for your account.

export.title: Export my data
export.description: Download a backup of your tasks, clients, and contacts.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
delete.confirmDescription: This will sign you out and delete your data. It can't be undone.
delete.error: We couldn't delete your account. Please try again.

emailModal.title: Change email address
emailModal.description: We'll send a confirmation link to the new email.
emailModal.successPrefix: We sent a confirmation link to
emailModal.successSuffix: Click it to complete the change.
emailModal.genericError: We couldn't request the email change.

passwordModal.addDescription: Create a password to sign in with your email address.
passwordModal.changeDescription: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
passwordModal.googleNotice: Once you add a password you'll be able to sign in with your email and this password, while still using Google.

errors.tooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters.
